title: Data Processing Agreement
s1_p1: This Data Processing Agreement (“DPA”) forms part of the agreement between AskBiz Ltd (“AskBiz”, “we”, “Processor”) and the business customer that uses AskBiz (“you”, “Controller”).
s1_p2_pre: When you use AskBiz to handle your own customers' personal data — for example their names, phone numbers, purchase history, parcel details, or photographs —
s1_p2_b1: you act as the data controller
s1_p2_b2: AskBiz acts as a data processor
s1_p2_post: on your behalf. You decide what data is collected and why; we process it only to provide the service.
s1_p3_pre: For data about your own account (your name, email, billing), AskBiz is the controller — that processing is covered by our
s2_p1_text: AskBiz's processing of personal data on your behalf to provide the AskBiz POS and business-intelligence platform.
s2_p2_text: Processing continues for as long as your account is active, and thereafter only as required to comply with legal obligations (e.g. tax records are retained for up to 7 years; see Section 7).
s3_li2: Storing customer records and managing loyalty / consent preferences
s3_li3: Sending receipts and notifications to your customers (subject to their consent)
s3_li4: AI scanning of images you capture (products, receipts, documents, vehicle plates)
s3_li5: Logistics: parcel tracking, vehicle inspections, and driver location for fleet management
s3_li6: Generating reports and analytics for your business
s4_p1_text: your customers, your staff, and (for logistics) your drivers and parcel recipients.
s4_p2_text: names, phone numbers, email addresses, transaction and purchase history, staff roles and PINs (hashed), photographs (e.g. parcels, vehicle inspections, scanned documents), and driver GPS location. We do not require special-category data; please do not upload it.
s5_li1_text: we process personal data only on your documented instructions, which include your use of the platform's features.
s5_li2_text: personnel authorised to process data are bound by confidentiality.
s5_li3_text: we apply appropriate technical and organisational measures — encryption in transit, encryption of integration credentials at rest, hashed staff PINs, row-level security isolating each business's data, and access controls.
s5_li4_text: the platform provides tools to export and erase/anonymise customer records so you can fulfil access and erasure requests.
s5_li5_text: we will notify you without undue delay after becoming aware of a personal-data breach affecting your data.
s5_li6_text: on termination, we delete or return personal data, subject to legal retention requirements.
s6_p1: You authorise AskBiz to engage the sub-processors listed below to help deliver the service. Each is bound by data-protection obligations consistent with this DPA. We will give you notice of any intended changes to this list so you may object.
s6_note: Note: customer data — including images you scan — is processed by Anthropic in the United States for AI features. International transfers rely on appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs).
sp_anthropic_purpose: AI processing of camera images and text — receipt, product, document, and number-plate scanning
sp_twilio_purpose: Customer SMS and WhatsApp messaging (receipts, notifications)
sp_tavily_purpose: Web search for business intelligence queries (no customer PII)
s7_p1: Customer records that become inactive are anonymised, and driver GPS location pings are purged, on an automated retention schedule. Transaction records are retained in anonymised form for up to 7 years to meet tax obligations. You may trigger erasure or export of an individual customer's data at any time from the customer management screen.
s8_p1: Some sub-processors process data outside the EU/UK (notably in the United States — see Section 6). Where this occurs, transfers are made under appropriate safeguards, principally the EU Standard Contractual Clauses and the UK International Data Transfer Addendum.
s9_p1_pre: Questions about this DPA, or to request a counter-signed copy:
